record.field:
TERMS & CONDITIONS

1. Introduction

These Terms & Conditions govern the provision of cleaning services by [Your Company Name] ("Company," "We," "Us") to business clients ("Client," "You"). By engaging our services, you agree to these terms.

2. Services Provided

2.1. The Company provides commercial cleaning services, including but not limited to:

  • Office cleaning
  • Industrial cleaning
  • Retail space cleaning
  • Janitorial services
  • Specialized cleaning (e.g., deep cleaning, disinfection)

2.2. The scope of services will be outlined in a separate Service Agreement or Work Order.

3. Service Schedule & Access

3.1. Cleaning services will be performed as per the agreed schedule.

3.2. The Client must provide access to the premises during scheduled cleaning times.

3.3. Any changes to the schedule require at least [X] hours’ notice.

4. Payment Terms

4.1. Fees are outlined in the Service Agreement.

4.2. Invoices are issued [weekly/monthly] and payable within [X] days from the invoice date.

4.3. Late payments may incur interest of [X]% per month.

4.4. Additional services requested outside the agreed contract will be billed separately.

5. Cancellation & Rescheduling

5.1. The Client may cancel or reschedule a cleaning session with at least [X] hours’ notice.

5.2. Cancellations with less notice may be subject to a cancellation fee of [X]% of the service charge.

5.3. The Company reserves the right to reschedule services due to unforeseen circumstances (e.g., staff shortages, emergencies).

6. Health & Safety Compliance

6.1. The Company adheres to all health and safety regulations.

6.2. The Client must inform the Company of any hazardous conditions or special requirements on the premises.

6.3. The Client must ensure safe working conditions for the cleaning staff.

7. Liability & Insurance

7.1. The Company carries liability insurance to cover damages caused by negligence.

7.2. The Client must report any damage claims within [X] hours of service completion.

7.3. The Company is not liable for pre-existing damage or loss of unattended valuables.

8. Confidentiality & Data Protection

8.1. The Company will keep all Client information confidential.

8.2. Any personal data shared will be processed in compliance with [relevant data protection laws].

9. Termination

9.1. Either party may terminate the agreement with [X] days’ written notice.

9.2. Immediate termination may occur if either party breaches these terms.

10. Dispute Resolution

10.1. Any disputes should first be resolved through negotiation.

10.2. If unresolved, disputes may be referred to arbitration in [jurisdiction].

11. Governing Law

These Terms & Conditions are governed by the laws of [your country/state].
